name: rtl-sdr
title: rtl-sdr
summary: Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (tools)
description:
Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (tools)
rtl-sdr is a software defined radio (SDR) receiver software for certain
low-cost DVB-T/DAB(+) USB dongles based on the Realtek RTL2832U chip.
.
This package contains a set of command line utilities:
* rtl_adsb: a simple ADS-B decoder for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers
* rtl_eeprom: an EEPROM programming tool for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers
* rtl_fm: a narrow band FM demodulator for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers
* rtl_sdr: an I/Q recorder for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers
* rtl_tcp: an I/Q spectrum server for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers
* rtl_test: a benchmark tool for RTL2832 based DVB-T receivers

arguments.description: a re-purposed DVB-T receiver as a software defined radio to receive and decode ADS-B
arguments.raw: -B  a re-purposed DVB-T receiver as a software defined radio to receive and decode ADS-B

arguments.description: while true; do rtl_adsb | nc -lp 8080; done
arguments.raw: -lp  while true; do rtl_adsb | nc -lp 8080; done

arguments.description: Automatic dependent surveillance-broadcast, ADS-B, consists of position and other status data
arguments.raw: -sdr  Automatic dependent surveillance-broadcast, ADS-B, consists of position and other status data

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rtl_adsb because Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (tools).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rtl_adsb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rtl_adsb [-R] [-g gain] [-p ppm] [output file]` as documented upstream for rtl_adsb.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rtl_adsb | netcat -lp 8080` as documented upstream for rtl_adsb.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `while true; do rtl_adsb | nc -lp 8080; done` as documented upstream for rtl_adsb.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rtl_adsb | socat -u - TCP4:sdrsharp.com:47806` as documented upstream for rtl_adsb.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rtl_adsb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rtl_adsb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
